chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt: Petition. No.S-83 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A.No.190 of 2023. 2. For orders on office objection “A”. 3. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2023 None has appeared on behalf of the petitioner. -.-.-.-.-.--.-.-.- The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the official respondents to protect him from the harassment of the private respondents. The petitioner has an alternate remedy to exhaust for the purpose before Ex- Officio Justice of Peace having jurisdiction. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge
